hero-header: What can you do with Ethereum?
hero-description: Ethereum powers financial tools, digital ownership, governance, scientific funding, and more. These are live applications used by millions of people around the world today.
financial-tools-description: Ethereum enables open financial services that anyone can access with an internet connection. There are no banks to approve accounts, no brokers to take a cut, and no borders limiting who can participate.
defi-description: Lend, borrow, trade, and earn interest without intermediaries. DeFi gives you direct control over your financial activity.
stablecoins-description: Tokens pegged to stable assets like the US dollar. Stablecoins combine the stability of traditional currencies with the speed and openness of Ethereum.
payments-description: Send money anywhere in the world in minutes with low fees. Ethereum makes cross-border payments fast and accessible.
rwa-description: Tokenized versions of real estate, bonds, commodities, and other traditional assets, bringing liquidity and accessibility to previously hard-to-access markets.
digital-ownership-description: Ethereum lets you own digital items in a way that is verifiable, transferable, and independent of any company.
nft-description: Unique digital items with provable ownership. NFTs let creators sell directly to audiences and let collectors hold verifiable originals.
gaming-description: Games where you truly own your in-game assets and where game logic runs on open, transparent smart contracts.
organizations-description: Ethereum provides tools for collective decision-making, self-sovereign identity, and social platforms that users control.
dao-description: Internet-native organizations governed by their members through transparent voting. No single person controls the funds or rules.
identity-description: Own and control your digital identity without relying on centralized providers. Prove things about yourself without revealing more than necessary.
social-description: Social platforms where you own your data, content, and connections. No company can deplatform you or sell your information.
science-description: Ethereum is used to fund and coordinate research, environmental projects, and public goods in new ways.
desci-description: Open infrastructure for funding, publishing, and crediting scientific research. DeSci uses Ethereum to make science more transparent and accessible.
refi-description: Financial tools designed to fund environmental and social regeneration rather than extraction.
emerging-description: New applications are constantly being built on Ethereum. These areas are rapidly growing and evolving.
ai-agents-description: Autonomous AI systems that can hold funds, execute transactions, and interact with smart contracts on your behalf.
prediction-markets-description: Markets where participants bet on the outcomes of future events, using financial incentives to generate crowd-sourced forecasts.
restaking-description: Extend Ethereum's security to other networks and services by reusing staked ETH, earning additional rewards while strengthening the ecosystem.
